name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

- A dependency-free Unity 2017.4 compatibility adapter is available under Legacy~/Unity2017 for projects that cannot load the Unity 6 UPM package.
- The adapter uses the production named-pipe protocol and relay, persistent project identity, discovery, and nine MCP endpoints including server status.
- The compatibility profile exposes project/editor context, post-start console diagnostics, scene and hierarchy inspection, basic GameObject and scene operations, and asset search/inspection.

### Previous Changes

- BatchActions hierarchy references are no longer misclassified as filesystem paths.
- RuntimeStateProbe sampling remains active when Time.timeScale is zero and releases its scheduler slot reliably.
- ManageGameObject Create applies and verifies private serialized ComponentProperties in Edit and Play Mode.
